text: Oh yes, quick, straight, and brilliant. Exceptional from Bumrah. You knew it was coming. Oh yes! What a way to end a cricket match. Perfect Yorkers at searing pace. Bang bang goes Bumrah. Yeah, brilliant. Brilliant stuff. So much control. So much accuracy. Well, he's not going to leave it for Saeed Afif. He has other ideas, and India finish this game off, win by twenty eight runs, and qualifies for the semi final.
